title: Aramex India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Aramex India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aramex India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Aramex India:
Aramex India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aramex India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
